response.justification: The candidate brings a genuinely broad technical background spanning ~17 years and has recent exposure to agentic AI tooling (MCP code generators, agentic workflows), but the role demands recognized, deep AI/ML expertise with demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms — none of which are evident here. The GISCollective founder experience shows entrepreneurial instinct but is an open-source side project, not the kind of venture-scale or intrapreneurial initiative the role implies. There is no evidence of cloud strategy work, customer advisory experience, or the director-level influence and thought leadership (publications, recognized AI work, strategic partnerships) that a Principal AI Strategy role at this seniority requires. The AI work described in the current role is too recent and too narrowly scoped to credibly anchor a candidacy at this level.
strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the tenure bar
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial drive and ability to ship a production platform independently
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, showing active engagement with the agentic AI ecosystem
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise — no models built, no AI products shipped, no publications or recognized work in AI prior to April 2025
No cloud strategy or cloud architecture experience of note; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is the only cloud signal and is tactical, not strategic
No evidence of director-level influence: no customer advisory work, no internal strategy contributions, no external thought leadership beyond a single FOSS4G talk

key_factors.factor: No strategic advisory or cloud leadership evidence
